name: The Indoor Golf Shop
about: The Indoor Golf Shop is an e-commerce retailer specializing in golf simulator technology and packages. They offer a comprehensive selection of premium and mid-tier systems, including Trackman, Garmin, SkyTrak, Uneekor, Foresight, FlightScope, and Square Golf simulators. The company provides resources for home and commercial setups, custom design services, and financing options. Their business model focuses on selling complete packages, components, and related accessories directly to consumers and businesses.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers a wide range of simulator packages for any budget and skill level
Provides expert resources and guides to help customers make informed decisions
Custom design and build services for creating a tailored golf simulator experience
Price match guarantee and financing options to make high-tech setups more accessible

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for commercial and home packages.
Photometric camera launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking.
Popular mid-tier photometric camera launch monitor known for affordability and accuracy.
High-speed camera-based launch monitor for commercial and home use.
Premium launch monitor technology for professional golf simulation.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: As an online retailer, The Indoor Golf Shop sells golf simulator packages and equipment for personal installation. Customers would use their own clubs with the purchased systems.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: This is an online retail store, not a physical venue. There are no facilities for consuming food or drinks on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and hardware used, as well as the number of players. Typically, 18 holes can be played in 1-2 hours depending on these factors.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: As an online retail store, The Indoor Golf Shop does not operate as a physical venue with age restrictions. However, their products are suitable for family use at home.
